code:
import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def get_observation(state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)

    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)], dtype=jnp.int32)

    agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    norm_ay = agent_y / (H_f - 1)
    norm_ax = agent_x / (W_f - 1)
    dir_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4)

    tile_ids = state.grid[:, :, 0]
    tile_colors = state.grid[:, :, 1]

    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    yy_f = yy.astype(jnp.float32)
    xx_f = xx.astype(jnp.float32)

    # ---- Pocket ----
    pocket_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 0).astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_green_ball = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == 3) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == 2)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pocket_tile_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.pocket[0], 13)
    pocket_color_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.pocket[1], 12)

    # ---- Blue pyramid (tile=5, color=3) ----
    blue_pyr_mask = (tile_ids == 5) & (tile_colors == 3)
    blue_pyr_count = jnp.sum(blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    blue_pyr_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_exists = jnp.clip(blue_pyr_count, 0.0, 1.0)
    rel_pyr_y = (blue_pyr_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_pyr_x = (blue_pyr_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_pyr = (jnp.abs(blue_pyr_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(blue_pyr_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # ---- Yellow hex (tile=11, color=5) ----
    yel_hex_mask = (tile_ids == 11) & (tile_colors == 5)
    yel_hex_count = jnp.sum(yel_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    yel_hex_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_exists = jnp.clip(yel_hex_count, 0.0, 1.0)
    rel_hex_y = (yel_hex_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_hex_x = (yel_hex_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_hex = (jnp.abs(yel_hex_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(yel_hex_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # ---- Front tile ----
    dy_f = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][0]
    dx_f = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][1]
    front_y = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy_f, 0, H - 1)
    front_x = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx_f, 0, W - 1)
    front_tile_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(tile_ids[front_y, front_x], 13)
    front_color_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(tile_colors[front_y, front_x], 12)
    front_is_blue_pyr = ((tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 5) & (tile_colors[front_y, front_x] == 3)).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_floor = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 1).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_closed_door = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 9).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_locked_door = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 8).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_to_hex_dist = (jnp.abs(front_y.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_y) +
                         jnp.abs(front_x.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_x))
    front_adj_hex = (front_to_hex_dist <= 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_floor_adj_hex = front_is_floor * front_adj_hex

    # ---- Agent adjacency ----
    agent_to_hex_dist = jnp.abs(agent_y - yel_hex_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - yel_hex_x)
    agent_adj_hex = (agent_to_hex_dist <= 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_adj_pyr = ((jnp.abs(agent_y - blue_pyr_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - blue_pyr_x)) <= 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)

    # ---- Task phase ----
    phase_pickup = (blue_pyr_exists * pocket_empty)
    phase_place = holding_green_ball
    can_place_now = holding_green_ball * front_floor_adj_hex
    step_norm = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 400.0

    # ---- Door tracking ----
    closed_door_mask = (tile_ids == 9)
    locked_door_mask = (tile_ids == 8)
    open_door_mask = (tile_ids == 10)
    n_closed = jnp.sum(closed_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    n_open = jnp.sum(open_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)

    all_blockable = closed_door_mask | locked_door_mask
    n_blockable = jnp.sum(all_blockable).astype(jnp.float32)

    # All 4 doors by position (sorted by quadrant)
    mid_y = H_f / 2.0
    mid_x = W_f / 2.0

    # Horizontal wall doors (doors on vertical midline - connect left/right rooms)
    # Vertical wall doors (doors on horizontal midline - connect top/bottom rooms)
    # Find doors in each half
    top_half_mask = all_blockable & (yy_f < mid_y)
    bot_half_mask = all_blockable & (yy_f >= mid_y)
    left_half_mask = all_blockable & (xx_f < mid_x)
    right_half_mask = all_blockable & (xx_f >= mid_x)

    def door_pos(mask):
        cnt = jnp.sum(mask).astype(jnp.float32)
        dy_ = jnp.sum(yy_f * mask) / jnp.maximum(cnt, 1.0)
        dx_ = jnp.sum(xx_f * mask) / jnp.maximum(cnt, 1.0)
        exists = jnp.clip(cnt, 0.0, 1.0)
        return dy_, dx_, exists

    top_dy, top_dx, top_exists = door_pos(top_half_mask)
    bot_dy, bot_dx, bot_exists = door_pos(bot_half_mask)
    left_dy, left_dx, left_exists = door_pos(left_half_mask)
    right_dy, right_dx, right_exists = door_pos(right_half_mask)

    # Relative door positions to agent
    rel_top_y = (top_dy - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_top_x = (top_dx - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    rel_bot_y = (bot_dy - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_bot_x = (bot_dx - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    rel_left_y = (left_dy - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_left_x = (left_dx - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    rel_right_y = (right_dy - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_right_x = (right_dx - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)

    # Open door centroid (for navigation)
    open_cnt = jnp.sum(open_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    open_dy = jnp.sum(yy_f * open_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(open_cnt, 1.0)
    open_dx = jnp.sum(xx_f * open_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(open_cnt, 1.0)
    rel_open_y = (open_dy - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_open_x = (open_dx - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)

    # ---- Room membership ----
    agent_in_tl = ((agent_y < mid_y) & (agent_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_in_tr = ((agent_y < mid_y) & (agent_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_in_bl = ((agent_y >= mid_y) & (agent_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_in_br = ((agent_y >= mid_y) & (agent_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)

    pyr_in_tl = ((blue_pyr_y < mid_y) & (blue_pyr_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_in_tr = ((blue_pyr_y < mid_y) & (blue_pyr_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_in_bl = ((blue_pyr_y >= mid_y) & (blue_pyr_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_in_br = ((blue_pyr_y >= mid_y) & (blue_pyr_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)

    hex_in_tl = ((yel_hex_y < mid_y) & (yel_hex_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    hex_in_tr = ((yel_hex_y < mid_y) & (yel_hex_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    hex_in_bl = ((yel_hex_y >= mid_y) & (yel_hex_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    hex_in_br = ((yel_hex_y >= mid_y) & (yel_hex_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)

    same_room_pyr = (agent_in_tl * pyr_in_tl + agent_in_tr * pyr_in_tr +
                     agent_in_bl * pyr_in_bl + agent_in_br * pyr_in_br)
    same_room_hex = (agent_in_tl * hex_in_tl + agent_in_tr * hex_in_tr +
                     agent_in_bl * hex_in_bl + agent_in_br * hex_in_br)

    # ---- Nearest floor cell adjacent to hex ----
    adj_hex_mask = ((jnp.abs(yy_f - yel_hex_y) + jnp.abs(xx_f - yel_hex_x)) == 1.0) & (tile_ids == 1)
    adj_hex_cnt = jnp.sum(adj_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    adj_hex_mean_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * adj_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(adj_hex_cnt, 1.0)
    adj_hex_mean_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * adj_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(adj_hex_cnt, 1.0)
    rel_adj_hex_y = (adj_hex_mean_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_adj_hex_x = (adj_hex_mean_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_adj_hex = (jnp.abs(adj_hex_mean_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(adj_hex_mean_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # ---- Full grid observation ----
    full_tiles = tile_ids.astype(jnp.float32).flatten() / 12.0   # 169
    full_colors = tile_colors.astype(jnp.float32).flatten() / 11.0  # 169

    # ---- Structured features ----
    structured = jnp.concatenate([
        # Agent position & direction (6)
        jnp.array([norm_ay, norm_ax]),
        dir_oh,

        # Pocket state (25 + 3)
        pocket_tile_oh,
        pocket_color_oh,
        jnp.array([pocket_empty, holding_green_ball, phase_pickup]),

        # Blue pyramid info (7)
        jnp.array([blue_pyr_y / (H_f - 1), blue_pyr_x / (W_f - 1),
                   rel_pyr_y, rel_pyr_x,
                   dist_pyr, blue_pyr_exists, agent_adj_pyr]),

        # Yellow hex info (7)
        jnp.array([yel_hex_y / (H_f - 1), yel_hex_x / (W_f - 1),
                   rel_hex_y, rel_hex_x,
                   dist_hex, yel_hex_exists, agent_adj_hex]),

        # Placement target: floor adjacent to hex (4)
        jnp.array([rel_adj_hex_y, rel_adj_hex_x, dist_adj_hex, adj_hex_cnt / 4.0]),

        # Front tile (25 + 5)
        front_tile_oh,
        front_color_oh,
        jnp.array([front_is_blue_pyr, front_adj_hex, front_is_floor,
                   front_is_closed_door, front_floor_adj_hex]),

        # Task flags (4)
        jnp.array([phase_place, can_place_now, n_closed / 4.0, n_open / 4.0]),

        # Room membership (14)
        jnp.array([agent_in_tl, agent_in_tr, agent_in_bl, agent_in_br,
                   pyr_in_tl, pyr_in_tr, pyr_in_bl, pyr_in_br,
                   hex_in_tl, hex_in_tr, hex_in_bl, hex_in_br,
                   same_room_pyr, same_room_hex]),

        # Door info by quadrant (12)
        jnp.array([rel_top_y, rel_top_x, top_exists,
                   rel_bot_y, rel_bot_x, bot_exists,
                   rel_left_y, rel_left_x, left_exists,
                   rel_right_y, rel_right_x, right_exists]),

        # Open door info (3)
        jnp.array([rel_open_y, rel_open_x, n_open / 4.0]),

        # Step progress (1)
        jnp.array([step_norm]),
    ])
    # structured: 6 + 28 + 7 + 7 + 4 + 30 + 4 + 14 + 12 + 3 + 1 = 116

    # Total: 116 + 169 + 169 = 454 (under 512)
    obs = jnp.concatenate([structured, full_tiles, full_colors])

    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)
